# Effective Claude Code Usage

> A Quarto RevealJS presentation by Indrajeet Patil about using Claude Code effectively as a CLI agent.

Canonical slides: https://www.indrapatil.com/effective-claude-code-usage/
Full agent summary: https://www.indrapatil.com/effective-claude-code-usage/llms-full.txt
Source: https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/effective-claude-code-usage/
